title: Mentions declining sharply — down 13pp in recent period
key_takeaway: Capital One's mention rate has dropped from 18.4% to 5.4% while Aqua and Barclaycard maintain presence. This is core credit builder territory being lost.
what_happened:
Prompt: "credit cards for bad credit"
Scrapes analysed: 11
Total citations: 123
Capital One mentions: 13 (10.6%)
Capital One citations: 12 (9.8%)
Period 1 mention rate: 18.4%
Period 2 mention rate: 5.4%
Trend: Declining (-13.0pp)
Top competitors: Aqua (7), Barclaycard (3), Tesco Bank (3)
Top cited sources: experian.co.uk, forbes.com, capitalone.co.uk
what_this_means: Capital One is losing ground on one of its most important category prompts. Mention rate has dropped by 13 percentage points between the first and second halves of the scrape period. Aqua is the most frequently mentioned competitor with 7 mentions. The decline suggests either competitor content has improved or LLM source preferences have shifted. Investigate what Aqua and Barclaycard are doing differently — content freshness, structured data, or editorial coverage — and update Capital One's credit builder content accordingly.

Scrapes analysed: 12
Total citations: 142
Capital One mentions: 5 (3.5%)
Capital One citations: 0 (0.0%)

what_this_means: Capital One is being talked about but isn't the source of that information. moneytothemasses.com alone accounts for 60 of 142 citations, making it the dominant voice in how LLMs answer this query. Capital One has no owned content ranking here — every mention is framed by third-party editorial sites. Creating authoritative owned content targeting "best credit cards" would give Capital One more control over how it's positioned in these responses.

title: Cited but never mentioned by name
key_takeaway: Capital One's website is cited as a source (1.1%) but the brand is never mentioned in the response text. The content is useful to LLMs but lacks brand signals.
what_happened:
Prompt: "balance transfer cards"
Scrapes analysed: 8
Total citations: 87
Capital One mentions: 0 (0.0%)
Capital One citations: 1 (1.1%)
Competitor mentions: 31
Top competitors: HSBC (8), TSB (4), Barclaycard (4), Santander (4)
Top cited sources: hsbc.co.uk, which.co.uk, experian.co.uk
what_this_means: The LLM cites Capital One's website as a source but doesn't mention the brand name in its response. This suggests the content is useful but lacks clear brand signals — entity markup, structured data, or prominent brand positioning within the page content.
